meta.title: (Previous) Live Stream! Hosting: SpaceX Iridium 2 launch
meta.description:
My first live stream of a launch. Sorry for the technical difficulties. Future launches should be more ironed out :) Ask any questions! Please keep it PG as we are a family friendly place :)

Show your support by visiting http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or by shopping for cool merch at http://everydayastronaut.com/shop
